title: Oqto Sandbox Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Oqto process sandboxing. This file is kept separate from config.toml so that agents cannot modify their own security restrictions.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON schema for validation and LSP completions

enabled.description: Enable process sandboxing. Requires bwrap (Linux) or sandbox-exec (macOS).

profile.description: Sandbox profile preset. 'minimal' protects secrets only; 'development' allows tool installation; 'strict' adds network/PID isolation.

deny_read.description: Paths to deny read access. These paths are blocked completely. Supports ~ for home directory.

allow_write.description: Paths to allow write access in addition to the workspace directory. Supports ~ for home directory.

deny_write.description: Paths to explicitly deny write access. Takes precedence over allow_write. ~/.config/oqto/sandbox.toml is always protected automatically.

isolate_network.description: Isolate network namespace (--unshare-net on Linux). Prevents network access from sandboxed processes.

isolate_pid.description: Isolate PID namespace (--unshare-pid on Linux). Hides other processes from sandboxed processes.

drop_all_caps.description: Drop Linux capabilities for sandboxed process (--cap-drop ALL).

disable_userns.description: Disable nested user namespace creation inside sandbox (--disable-userns).

assert_userns_disabled.description: Require nested user namespaces to be disabled (--assert-userns-disabled).

landlock_mode.description: Landlock behavior: off=disabled, audit=warn if unavailable, enforce=fail closed if unavailable.

seccomp_mode.description: Seccomp behavior: off=disabled, audit=log missing policy and continue, enforce=fail closed if policy missing.

seccomp_bpf_path.description: Path to precompiled seccomp-bpf filter consumed by bubblewrap (--seccomp FD).

extra_ro_bind.description: Additional paths to bind read-only into the sandbox.

extra_rw_bind.description: Additional paths to bind read-write into the sandbox.

overlay_enabled.description: Enable overlayfs redirection for overlay_paths using bwrap --overlay.

overlay_root.description: Root directory for per-workspace overlay upper/work dirs.

overlay_paths.description: Paths to mount via overlayfs (reads from original path, writes redirected).

x-security-note: This configuration file must be protected from agent modification. The sandbox system automatically denies writes to this file and to .oqto/sandbox.toml in workspaces.

x-merge-behavior.description: When workspace .oqto/sandbox.toml exists, it is merged with global config
x-merge-behavior.deny_read: Union - workspace can add paths, not remove
x-merge-behavior.deny_write: Union - workspace can add paths, not remove
x-merge-behavior.allow_write: Intersection - must be allowed by BOTH global and workspace
x-merge-behavior.isolate_network: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.isolate_pid: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.drop_all_caps: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.disable_userns: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.assert_userns_disabled: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.no_new_privs: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.seccomp_bpf_path: Workspace path preferred when set; otherwise global value
x-merge-behavior.overlay_enabled: OR - if either enables, it's enabled
x-merge-behavior.overlay_paths: Union - workspace can add overlay targets
x-merge-behavior.overlay_root: Workspace value preferred when set to non-default
